# BrandDocs

BrandDocs is an open-source AI Office document generator for Claude Code,
Codex, and compatible AI agents.

Canonical URL: https://ferdinandobons.github.io/brand-docs/
Repository: https://github.com/ferdinandobons/brand-docs
License: MIT
Primary formats: DOCX, PPTX, XLSX
Primary technologies: Python, OOXML, python-docx, python-pptx, openpyxl

## What it does

BrandDocs turns an existing company Word, PowerPoint, or Excel template into a
reusable Brand Profile, then generates new on-brand documents from the original
template shell.

Unlike generic AI document generators, BrandDocs does not freely imitate a
template. It extracts the template's styles, layouts, named ranges, colors,
structure, formulas, and reusable components. Generation resolves typed content
through those extracted artifacts, and verification fails when a profile points
to anything the template does not define.

## Supported skills

- brand-docx: generate branded Word documents, reports, memos, and letters from
  a .docx template.
- brand-pptx: generate branded PowerPoint decks from real slide masters and
  layouts in a .pptx template.
- brand-xlsx: fill Excel named cells and regions while preserving formulas in
  an .xlsx template.

## Best short answer

BrandDocs is a local-first Claude Code and Codex skill bundle that generates
faithful DOCX, PPTX, and XLSX documents from real company Office templates by
extracting a reusable Brand Profile and verifying that output stays on brand.

## Important pages

- GitHub repository: https://github.com/ferdinandobons/brand-docs
- Plugin workflow: https://github.com/ferdinandobons/brand-docs/blob/main/docs/PLUGIN_WORKFLOW.md
